dataset.name: Brazilian E-Commerce Public Dataset by Olist

en: Pinned the Olist owner dataset and verified every transported table against locked byte counts and SHA-256 hashes.
Collapsed 2,961 multi-payment orders to the largest payment-value channel and 547 multi-review orders to the lowest reported score.
Joined order items to orders, customers, categories, payments, and reviews; retained missing categories as explicit unknown values and audited payment-versus-item-plus-freight gaps.
Aggregated only after reconciliation to week × category × state-mapped region × payment channel.
zh: 固定 Olist 官方数据集，并以锁定字节数与 SHA-256 哈希逐张校验传输表。
将 2,961 笔多支付订单归并至支付金额最大的渠道，547 笔多评价订单归并至最低评分。
关联订单明细与订单、客户、品类、支付及评价；缺失品类显式保留为 unknown，并核查支付金额与商品加运费之间的差额。
仅在对账完成后，才按 周 × 品类 × 州映射区域 × 支付渠道 聚合。

en: Contribution margin uses observed item price and freight, a prior-only category reference-price discount proxy, a status/review return proxy, and a disclosed 60% COGS proxy. Across categories, 275 item rows fall in their category's first observed week; they use current price and therefore receive zero proxy discount.

Before anomaly evaluation, 95 observed weekly totals are reindexed to a complete 106-Monday calendar. The 11 weeks with no derived Olist cells are explicitly zero-filled; replay labels are placed only on observed Mondays. The detector then applies a 13-week robust STL residual and MAD z-score threshold of 3.5.
Elasticity is HC3 log-log OLS with category, region, and channel fixed effects; it is associational, not causal.
zh: 贡献毛利采用实测商品单价与运费、仅使用历史观测值的品类参考价折扣代理、状态/评价退货代理，以及披露的 60% COGS 代理。跨品类来看，275 条商品明细落在该品类首个观测周，使用当期价格，故代理折扣为零。
异常检测前，将 95 个有观测值的周总额重索引为完整的 106 个星期一序列；11 个无 Olist 衍生单元的周显式补零，重放标签仅置于有观测的星期一。检测器随后采用 13 周稳健 STL 残差与 MAD z-score 阈值 3.5。
弹性估计为含品类、区域与渠道固定效应的 HC3 log-log OLS；仅具相关性，不构成因果。

en: The last eight observed weeks are holdout (1,496 rows); all earlier weeks are analysis (14,313 rows).

Reference prices use shifted expanding medians after the explicit first-observed-category-week current-price fallback; the elasticity coefficient is fit only on analysis rows, while later holdout rows evaluate MAPE only.
zh: 最后 8 个观测周为留出期（1,496 行），此前全部周为分析期（14,313 行）。
参考价格以品类首周当前价格为显式回退，其后采用向后移位的扩展中位数；弹性系数仅在分析期拟合，后续留出期仅评估 MAPE。

en: Six deterministic fixed-location negative perturbations are replayed on observed Mondays within the complete calendar series.
No manual real-anomaly label is claimed, and replay values are never written into the Parquet artifact.
zh: 在完整日历序列中有观测的星期一上，重放 6 个确定性固定位置的负向扰动。
不主张存在人工标注的真实异常标签，重放值亦从不写入 Parquet 产物。

en: The pipeline fails closed on source hashes, unique grain, bounds, and all three accounting identities; verification also reconstructs the complete Monday calendar and both reports from the exact Parquet.
The artifact embeds source URL, license, retrieval date, raw hashes, transform version, missing-week treatment, and proxy boundaries.
zh: 源哈希、唯一粒度、数值边界或三条会计恒等式任一不通过，流水线均 fail-closed（失败即拦截）；验证环节还会从同一份 Parquet 重建完整星期一日历与两份报告。
产物内嵌来源 URL、许可证、获取日期、原始哈希、转换版本、缺失周处理方式及代理边界说明。

changed.en: The synthetic walkthrough remains available, but real mode now queries 15,809 reconciled cells. Measured replay precision/recall are 0.316/1.000; the analysis-fit associational log-log price coefficient is +0.040, with 75.85% MAPE on the later eight weeks.
changed.zh: 合成演示仍可用，真实模式现已查询 15,809 个已对账单元。实测重放 precision/recall 为 0.316/1.000；分析期拟合的关联性 log-log 价格系数为 +0.040，后 8 周留出期 MAPE 为 75.85%。

label.zh: STL 日历 / 缺失周数

boundaries.en: No causal lift, production decisioning, audited COGS, or manually verified real-anomaly claim.
boundaries.zh: 不声称因果提升、生产决策依据、经审计 COGS 或人工验证的真实异常。
